reasoning: Based on current betting odds and expert analysis from early April 2026, the overall favorite to win Eurovision 2026 is Finland, representing an implied probability of about 30-36%. France, Denmark, and Greece follow closely in the odds, all of which are European countries that would trigger a YES resolution. The countries that would resolve the question to NO (Armenia, Australia, Azerbaijan, and Israel) are participating, but only Australia and Israel show meaningful odds. Australia sits at around 8/1 to 9/1 (~10-11% implied probability) and Israel is at 14/1 to 16/1 (~6% implied probability). Armenia and Azerbaijan combine for roughly 0.7% implied probability. The sum of implied probabilities for the NO outcomes is approximately 17-18%. Taking into account standard bookmaker margins (overrounds of 120-130%), this translates to a true probability of roughly 13-14% for NO, or an 86-87% chance for a YES resolution. This aligns near perfectly with the Manifold market prediction of 87%.
